feed.title: Probus - International Journal of Romance Linguistics
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Probus - International Journal of Romance Linguistics (De Gruyter)

entry.title: A syntactic account of auxiliary selection in French
entry.summary: Authors: Marc Olivier DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/probus-2024-0005 Pages: Page range: 163-197

entry.title: Investigating locality constraints onwh-in situ in French: an experiment
entry.summary: Authors: Ruoxuan Li, Doriane Gras, Caterina Donati DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/probus-2025-0002 Pages: Page range: 199-232

entry.title: Focalization in situ and the absence of covert focus movement in Brazilian Portuguese
entry.summary: Authors: Renato Lacerda DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/probus-2025-0004 Pages: Page range: 233-261

entry.title: French clausal ellipsis: types and derivations
entry.summary: Authors: J.-Marc Authier DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/probus-2025-0001 Pages: Page range: 263-312

entry.title: Radical tmesis is Internal Merge
entry.summary: Authors: Erik Zyman DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/probus-2025-0007 Pages: Page range: 313-353
